bead.title: server: migrate handleAgentRun + workers handler to RunViaServiceWithConfig
bead.description:
Stage 2 prereq for B22.

Migrate cli/internal/server/server.go's handleAgentRun (and any sibling workers REST endpoint that constructs RunOptions) off RunOptions to agent.RunViaServiceWithConfig.

In-scope:
- cli/internal/server/server.go (handleAgentRun, workers prompt handler)
- Server tests

Out-of-scope:
- agent/internal helpers (B22d)
- exec migration (B22b)
bead.acceptance: field RunOptions removed from cli/internal/server/server.go. cd cli && go build ./... passes. cd cli && go test ./internal/server/... passes.
